description: Fix 14 TypeScript compilation errors, 9 ESLint errors, add fetch timeouts, MV3 keep-alive, postMessage origin hardening, API key encryption, cache LRU reliability, inline translate dedup fix, deep-merge settings, rate limiting, CSP, unhandled promise rejections, listener cleanup, content-script re-injection guard, safe DOM construction, subtitle fetch allow-list, and React error boundaries. Comprehensive hardening pass across build, runtime, security, and robustness layers.
